name: Baselode Energy Corp.
description: Baselode Energy Corp. is a Canadian uranium exploration company focused on discovering high-grade, basement-hosted uranium deposits in the Athabasca Basin area of northern Saskatchewan. The company utilizes innovative geophysical techniques and a 'Basement-First' exploration strategy to identify shallow, high-grade targets outside of the traditional sandstone-hosted models. Baselode's primary projects include the Hook, Catharsis, and Shadow projects, with the ACKIO discovery on the Hook project representing a significant near-surface uranium find. The company is committed to efficient exploration and creating shareholder value through discovery in one of the world's premier uranium jurisdictions.
